title: Library of Congress Industrial Revolution Primary Sources
description: A LOC source card for Industrial Revolution primary sources in the United States.
license: Library of Congress / item-level rights vary

pages.text: The Library of Congress Industrial Revolution source set includes materials about factories, labor, transportation, immigration, cities, and economic change.
Use this source for analyzing cause and effect, continuity and change, and the lived experience behind industrial growth.
Library of Congress source sets include public-domain and rights-unknown primary sources. Use the item pages to confirm rights before mirroring individual documents.
